items.headline: 1,929 warm leads sitting idle - reactivation sequence built
items.detail: 3-email sequence created in HubSpot (IDs 210149699674, 210149699677, 210149977892). Conservative 2.5% booking = ~$28K revenue. 5% = ~$58K. Harry needs 2 mins in HubSpot to schedule sends: tonight 7pm, Thu 8am, next Mon 7pm.

items.headline: MRR dropped $52K to $41K - but close rate is 57%
items.detail: Revenue dip is a BOOKING problem, not a closing problem. 119 leads last week, only 14 booked (11.8%). When reps get on calls, they close. Tom starting April 6 adds 15+ slots/week. The 92 contacts that bounced are still warm.

items.headline: 36 families closed but never activated - Brodie now gets daily chase list
items.detail: Daily 7:45am cron sends Brodie an HTML email with his activation chase list. 14+ days without W1 = critical. Revenue at risk from non-activated families: ~$6,500/week. The 46% first-month churn starts here.

items.headline: Retention call engine is live - no more scheduling friction
items.detail: Daily 8:30am email lands in Harry's inbox with top 5 families to call, personalised talking points, renewal dates, commitment lock offer script. 49 families renew in next 30 days = $28,461/week at risk. Previous 50 retention calls = $30K+ recovered.

items.headline: Mentor pipeline: 285 contacts queued, approval page live
items.detail: Interactive approval page at MC /mentor-pipeline/outreach/. 285 emails across Mon-Fri (58/71/71/50/35). Templates editable in browser, Supabase-backed. Harry approves templates + days, Leo sends. Student-facing blurb ready.

leo_actions: Running Fireflies backfill for about_the_son field (22 families matched, API reset at 7:30am)
Monitoring mentor outreach approval - ready to send W1 batch when Harry greenlights
Warm lead reactivation emails staged - waiting for Harry to schedule in HubSpot UI
Agent Stack: 9/14 skills shipped, continuing build on remaining 5
